empty_subtitle: Upload documents and wait for extraction to finish. Parsed data from successful extractions will show up here.
empty_filtered_title: No data matches the selected filters
empty_filtered_subtitle: Try widening the date range, or clear the filters.
export_dialog_description: Choose a format and optional date range. The export runs in the background; you can monitor progress in Exports.
export_filter_help: Leave empty to export every parsed document.
export_toast_queued: Export queued. Check Exports for progress.
export_toast_limit: You already have the maximum number of queued or running exports. Delete or wait for one to finish.
stale_tooltip: This document was extracted with an older schema. Re-extract to apply the latest fields.
exports_empty_subtitle: Exports you create from Parsed data appear here.
export_delete_confirm_description: The generated file and this record will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
export_download_failed: Failed to fetch the download link.
